properties.query: SELECT * FROM quizzes WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE() AND village_id = ? ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT content, mafia_Id, quiz_title, quiz_Id, village_id FROM quizzes WHERE village_id = ?
SELECT content, mafia_id, quiz_title, quiz_id, village_id FROM quizzes WHERE quiz_id = ? AND village_id = ?
INSERT INTO quizzes (quiz_id, user_id, mafia_id, village_id, quiz_title, content, answer, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NOW())
DELETE FROM quizzes WHERE quiz_id = ? AND village_id = ? AND mafia_id = ( SELECT mafia_id FROM mafia_history WHERE user_id = ? AND selected_date = CURDATE() AND village_id = ? )
DELETE FROM quizzes WHERE quiz_id = ? and village_id = ?

UPDATE quizzes SET quiz_title = ?, content = ?, answer = ? WHERE quiz_id = ? AND village_id = ? AND mafia_id = ( SELECT mafia_id FROM mafia_history WHERE user_id = ? AND selected_date = CURDATE() AND village_id = ? )
UPDATE quizzes SET quiz_title = ?, content = ?, answer = ? WHERE quiz_id = ? AND village_id = ?
SELECT quiz_id, quiz_title, content, answer, village_id FROM quizzes WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE() AND village_id = ? ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
